name: Checkers
description: A checkerboard mid-game — the board holds still while the pieces hop squares, king up and swap sides on every redraw.

code.style: --piece: @p(var(--color2), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color3), var(--color3)); --rule: ( @match((x + y) % 2 == 0) { background: var(--color1); } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 18%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--piece); box-shadow: 0 calc(10px / @Y) 0 rgba(30, 20, 10, 0.35); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.14) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 34%; border: calc(26px / @Y) solid var(--color4); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 600ms; } } transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
